title: Mondomanila, or: How I Fixed My Hair After a Rather Long Journey
original_title: Mondomanila: Kung paano ko inayos ang buhok ko matapos ang mahaba-haba ring paglalakbay
overview: Mondomanila tells the story of teenage anti-hero Tony de Guzman and the rough neighborhood he calls home.
